        # --- Line Detection for Lava and Walls ---
        # Group similar elements for line detection
        lava_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '}' and mx != -1 and my != -1]
        horizontal_wall_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '-' and mx != -1 and my != -1]
        vertical_wall_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '|' and mx != -1 and my != -1]

        def detect_and_report_lines(char_type, known_type_desc, tiles_list, is_horizontal_char):
            grouped_by_fixed_coord = {}
            if is_horizontal_char: 
                for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y in tiles_list:
                    grouped_by_fixed_coord.setdefault(abs_y, []).append((abs_x, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y))
            else: 
                for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y in tiles_list:
                    grouped_by_fixed_coord.setdefault(abs_x, []).append((abs_y, rel_y_to_agent, rel_x_to_agent, map_y, map_x)) 

            reported_lines_local = []
            for fixed_coord, variable_coords_info in grouped_by_fixed_coord.items():
                variable_coords_info.sort() 

                if not variable_coords_info: continue

                # Determine the fixed relative coordinate for this line 
                fixed_rel_coord_for_group = variable_coords_info[0][2] # This gets rel_y_to_agent (for horizontal) or rel_x_to_agent (for vertical)

                # Start the first segment; unpack only needed vars
                start_abs_var, start_rel_var, _, _, _ = variable_coords_info[0] 
                current_abs_var, current_rel_var = start_abs_var, start_rel_var
                
                for i in range(1, len(variable_coords_info)):
                    next_abs_var, next_rel_var, _, _, _ = variable_coords_info[i] 
                    if next_abs_var == current_abs_var + 1: 
                        current_abs_var = next_abs_var
                        current_rel_var = next_rel_var
                    else:
                        if (current_abs_var - start_abs_var) >= 1: 
                            if map_has_abs_coords:
                                if is_horizontal_char:
                                    line_start_abs = (start_abs_var, fixed_coord)
                                    line_end_abs = (current_abs_var, fixed_coord)
                                    line_start_rel = (start_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group) 
                                    line_end_rel = (current_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group) 
                                else: # Vertical
                                    line_start_abs = (fixed_coord, start_abs_var)
                                    line_end_abs = (fixed_coord, current_abs_var)
                                    line_start_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, start_rel_var) 
                                    line_end_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, current_rel_coord_for_group) # This was a bug; fixed
                                
                                length = abs(current_abs_var - start_abs_var) + 1
                                reported_lines_local.append(
                                    f"{known_type_desc} '{char_type}' detected as a {'horizontal' if is_horizontal_char else 'vertical'} line of length {length}: "
                                    f"from abs:{line_start_abs} to {line_end_abs}, "
                                    f"rel:{line_start_rel} to {line_end_rel} from agent."
                                )
                                if is_horizontal_char:
                                    for x_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[0], line_end_abs[0] + 1):
                                        reported_coords_by_line.add((x_coord_in_line, line_start_abs[1]))
                                else: 
                                    for y_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[1], line_end_abs[1] + 1):
                                        reported_coords_by_line.add((line_start_abs[0], y_coord_in_line))
                            
                        # Reset for next segment or single point
                        start_abs_var, start_rel_var = next_abs_var, next_rel_var
                        current_abs_var, current_rel_var = start_abs_var, start_rel_var
                
                # After loop, check for any remaining line segment
                if (current_abs_var - start_abs_var) >= 1: 
                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        if is_horizontal_char:
                            line_start_abs = (start_abs_var, fixed_coord)
                            line_end_abs = (current_abs_var, fixed_coord)
                            line_start_rel = (start_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group)
                            line_end_rel = (current_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group)
                        else: 
                            line_start_abs = (fixed_coord, start_abs_var)
                            line_end_abs = (fixed_coord, current_abs_var)
                            line_start_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, start_rel_var)
                            line_end_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, current_rel_var)
                        
                        length = abs(current_abs_var - start_abs_var) + 1 
                        reported_lines_local.append(
                            f"{known_type_desc} '{char_type}' detected as a {'horizontal' if is_horizontal_char else 'vertical'} line of length {length}: "
                            f"from abs:{line_start_abs} to {line_end_abs}, "
                            f"rel:{line_start_rel} to {line_end_rel} from agent."
                        )
                        if is_horizontal_char:
                            for x_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[0], line_end_abs[0] + 1):
                                reported_coords_by_line.add((x_coord_in_line, line_start_abs[1]))
                        else: 
                            for y_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[1], line_end_abs[1] + 1):
                                reported_coords_by_line.add((line_start_abs[0], y_coord_in_line))
            return reported_lines_local


        # Lava is always vertical in these examples, but making it generalizable to `is_horizontal_char=False`
        map_elements_found_list.extend(detect_and_report_lines('}', KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}'], lava_tiles, False)) 
        map_elements_found_list.extend(detect_and_report_lines('-', KNOWN_SYMBOLS['-'], horizontal_wall_tiles, True))
        map_elements_found_list.extend(detect_and_report_lines('|', KNOWN_SYMBOLS['|'], vertical_wall_tiles, False))

        # --- Report other individual elements not covered by lines ---
        for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x, rel_y, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords:
            if char != '.' and char != '@' and char not in ['-','|','}'] and (abs_x, abs_y) not in reported_coords_by_line: 
                description_parts = []
                if map_has_abs_coords:
                    description_parts.append(f"abs:({abs_x},{abs_y})")
                description_parts.append(f"rel:({rel_x},{rel_y})")
                
                relative_direction_str = get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y)
                location_display = f" {relative_direction_str}" if relative_direction_str not in ["at agent's position", ""] else ""

                char_desc = KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(char)
                if char_desc:
                    additional_info = ""
                    if char == 'd':
                        additional_info = " (Moving into or adjacent to this tile will cause agent to attack and likely kill this monster without consuming an additional action.)"
                    elif char == 'x':
                        additional_info = " (Trap)"
                    
                    map_elements_found_list.append(f"{char_desc} '{char}' at: {' '.join(description_parts)}{location_display}{additional_info}.")
                elif char.strip(): 
                    map_elements_found_list.append(f"Unknown symbol '{char}' at: {' '.join(description_parts)}{location_display}.")
        
        map_elements_found_list.sort() 
        output_lines.extend(map_elements_found_list) 


    # 4. Immediate Movement Safety & 1-step Lookahead
    if found_agent_on_map:
        output_lines.append("\nMovement Safety & 1-step Lookahead:")
        move_directions = {
            "north": (0, -1), "northeast": (1, -1), "east": (1, 0), "southeast": (1, 1),
            "south": (0, 1), "southwest": (-1, 1), "west": (-1, 0), "northwest": (-1, -1)
        }
        
        for move_name, (dx, dy) in move_directions.items():
            target_x_rel = dx
            target_y_rel = dy
            target_char = perceived_map_elements_relative.get((target_x_rel, target_y_rel), ' ')
            
            safety_status_msg = ""

            target_x_absolute = -1
            target_y_absolute = -1
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                target_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + dx
                target_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + dy

            status_prefix = ""
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                status_prefix += f"at abs:({target_x_absolute},{target_y_absolute}) "
            status_prefix += f"rel:({target_x_rel},{target_y_rel}) char:'{target_char}' -> "


            is_char_lava = (target_char == '}')
            is_moving_into_known_lava_column = (map_has_abs_coords and 
                                                target_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and 
                                                KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= target_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX)
            
            if is_char_lava or is_moving_into_known_lava_column:
                safety_status_msg = f"LETHAL ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']}) - "
                if is_char_lava:
                    safety_status_msg += "direct lava tile perception"
                if is_moving_into_known_lava_column:
                    if is_char_lava: safety_status_msg += " and "
                    safety_status_msg += f"crossing X={KNOWN_LAVA_X} while in lethal Y-span ({KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN}-{KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX})"
            elif target_char in ['-', '|']:
                safety_status_msg = f"BLOCKED ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]} '{target_char}')" 
            elif target_char == '.': 
                safety_status_msg = "SAFE (Floor tile)"
            elif target_char == ' ':
                safety_status_msg = "SAFE (Open space)"
            elif target_char in ['<', '>']: 
                safety_status_msg = f"SAFE ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]})"
            elif target_char in ['F', ':']: 
                safety_status_msg = f"SAFE ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]})"
            elif target_char == 'd':
                safety_status_msg = f"MOVE_ATTACKS_MONSTER ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]} '{target_char}', agent will attack and likely kill monster without consuming an additional action)" 
            elif target_char == 'x': 
                safety_status_msg = f"CAUTION (Trap '{target_char}')"
            else:
                safety_status_msg = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)" 

            output_lines.append(f"  Move {move_name}: {status_prefix}{safety_status_msg}")
    
    # 5. Proactive 2-step Lookahead for Lava & Walls including circumnavigation blockage
    if found_agent_on_map:
        proactive_warnings = []
        move_directions = {
            "north": (0, -1), "northeast": (1, -1), "east": (1, 0), "southeast": (1, 1),
            "south": (0, 1), "southwest": (-1, 1), "west": (-1, 0), "northwest": (-1, -1)
        }
        
        for first_move_name, (first_dx, first_dy) in move_directions.items():
            
            step1_x_absolute = -1
            step1_y_absolute = -1
            step1_char = ' ' # Default to open space if not perceived as anything else
            
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                step1_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + first_dx
                step1_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + first_dy
                step1_char = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((step1_x_absolute, step1_y_absolute), ' ')
            
            # --- Check for immediate lethality/blockage on step 1 ---
            is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = False
            step1_status_detail = ""
            
            is_step1_char_lava = (step1_char == '}')
            is_step1_moving_into_known_lava_column = (map_has_abs_coords and 
                                                       step1_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and 
                                                       KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step1_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX)
            
            if is_step1_char_lava or is_step1_moving_into_known_lava_column:
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True
                step1_status_detail = f"LETHAL ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']})"
            elif step1_char in ['-', '|'] or (map_has_abs_coords and (step1_x_absolute, step1_y_absolute) in known_wall_coords_absolute):
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True
                step1_status_detail = f"BLOCKED ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(step1_char, 'Wall')})"
            
            if is_step1_lethal_or_blocked:
                # If step 1 is lethal or blocked, we report it under 1-step lookahead already and don't consider 2-steps from here
                # However, for completeness here, we can add a warning if it's not already covered
                # For this iteration, we focus on *safe* first steps leading to *bad* second steps or positions
                pass

            # Only consider first steps that are not directly lethal or blocked
            if not is_step1_lethal_or_blocked:
                # Check 2-step direct collisions
                for second_move_name, (second_dx, second_dy) in move_directions.items():
                    step2_x_absolute = -1
                    step2_y_absolute = -1
                    step2_char = ' '

                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        step2_x_absolute = step1_x_absolute + second_dx
                        step2_y_absolute = step1_y_absolute + second_dy
                        step2_char = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((step2_x_absolute, step2_y_absolute), ' ')

                    status_type = ""
                    status_detail = ""

                    is_step2_char_lava = (step2_char == '}')
                    is_step2_moving_into_known_lava_column = (map_has_abs_coords and 
                                                               step2_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and 
                                                               KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step2_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX)

                    if is_step2_char_lava or is_step2_moving_into_known_lava_column:
                        status_type = "LETHAL"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']})"
                    elif step2_char in ['-', '|'] or (map_has_abs_coords and (step2_x_absolute, step2_y_absolute) in known_wall_coords_absolute):
                        status_type = "BLOCKED"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(step2_char, 'Wall')})"
                    
                    if status_type:
                        warning_message = (
                            f"  Moving {first_move_name} then {second_move_name} "
                            f"would be {status_type} {status_detail} at abs:({step2_x_absolute},{step2_y_absolute})."
                        )
                        proactive_warnings.append(warning_message)

                # Check if moving to step1's X-coordinate leads to both circumvention paths being blocked
                if map_has_abs_coords:
                    is_north_blocked_at_step1_x, is_south_blocked_at_step1_x = \
                        check_lava_circumvention_blockage(step1_x_absolute, perceived_map_elements_absolute, known_wall_coords_absolute)
                    
                    if is_north_blocked_at_step1_x and is_south_blocked_at_step1_x:
                        proactive_warnings.append(
                            f"  Moving {first_move_name} to abs:({step1_x_absolute},{step1_y_absolute}) "
                            f"would lead to an X-coordinate ({step1_x_absolute}) where BOTH north (Y<={KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN-1}) "
                            f"and south (Y>={KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX+1}) circumvention paths are BLOCKED by walls."
                        )

        output_lines.append("\nProactive 2-step Lookahead (Lava & Walls, including Circumvention Path Blockage):")
        if proactive_warnings:
            proactive_warnings = sorted(list(set(proactive_warnings))) 
            output_lines.extend(proactive_warnings)
        else:
            output_lines.append("  No immediate 2-step paths detected leading to lethal or blocked obstructions, or to X-coordinates fully blocking circumvention.")

    # 5.1 Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate)
    if map_has_abs_coords:
        output_lines.append("\nLava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate):")
        
        is_north_blocked_curr, is_south_blocked_curr = \
            check_lava_circumvention_blockage(agent_x_absolute, perceived_map_elements_absolute, known_wall_coords_absolute)

        target_y_north = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1 
        target_char_north = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((agent_x_absolute, target_y_north), ' ')
        path_north_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if (agent_x_absolute, target_y_north) in known_wall_coords_absolute: # Prioritize walls from the full set
             path_north_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((agent_x_absolute, target_y_north)), 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_north}') (from full wall set)"
        elif target_char_north == '.':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_north == ' ':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_north == '}':
            path_north_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_north, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_north}')"
        
        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely NORTH (Y<={target_y_north}) is {path_north_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_north}), rel:(0,{target_y_north - agent_y_absolute}).")

        target_y_south = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1
        target_char_south = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((agent_x_absolute, target_y_south), ' ')
        path_south_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if (agent_x_absolute, target_y_south) in known_wall_coords_absolute: # Prioritize walls from the full set
            path_south_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((agent_x_absolute, target_y_south)), 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_south}') (from full wall set)"
        elif target_char_south == '.':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_south == ' ':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_south == '}':
            path_south_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_south, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_south}')"

        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely SOUTH (Y>={target_y_south}) is {path_south_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_south}), rel:(0,{target_y_south - agent_y_absolute}).")

        # 5.2 Discover other X-coordinates suitable for lava circumvention
        if map_has_abs_coords and is_north_blocked_curr and is_south_blocked_curr:
            output_lines.append("\nFinding alternative X-coordinates for Lava Circumnavigation:")
            found_clear_x = []
            
            # Check adjacent X-coordinates (e.g., -1, +1, -2, +2 relative to agent_x_absolute)
            # The range for searching `x_offset_from_agent` can be tuned, e.g., -5 to +5
            for x_offset_from_agent in range(-5, 6): # Check up to 5 steps away horizontally
                if x_offset_from_agent == 0: continue # Skip current X, already checked

                candidate_x_abs = agent_x_absolute + x_offset_from_agent
                
                # We need to make sure the walls at this candidate_x_abs are *visible*
                # For `perceived_map_elements_absolute`, we only have visible tiles.
                # If a wall is not visible, we can't confirm it exists or is clear. 
                # This suggests that my `known_wall_coords_absolute` should indeed only contain *visible* walls.
                # The assumption is that agent only knows current visible walls, not full map.

                # Re-evaluate the helper usage: it should also confirm visibility for 'clear' path status.
                # For now, `check_lava_circumvention_blockage` refers to `perceived_abs_map_elements_ref.get()`
                # If `get()` returns None for the target_y_north/south, it's not a perceived wall/lava.
                # The logic for `is_north_blocked` and `is_south_blocked` correctly implies: if we *see* a wall, it's blocked.
                # If we *don't see anything*, it's functionally 'clear' from *our current perception*.
                # This is important: The current `check_lava_circumvention_blockage` correctly implies "KNOWN OBSTRUCTION" rather than "FULL BLOCKAGE".

                is_north_blocked_candidate, is_south_blocked_candidate = \
                    check_lava_circumvention_blockage(candidate_x_abs, perceived_map_elements_absolute, known_wall_coords_absolute)
                
                status_north = "BLOCKED" if is_north_blocked_candidate else "CLEAR (or unperceived)"
                status_south = "BLOCKED" if is_south_blocked_candidate else "CLEAR (or unperceived)"

                if not is_north_blocked_candidate or not is_south_blocked_candidate:
                    # Found an X-coordinate where at least one path is not visibly blocked
                    found_clear_x.append(f"  X={candidate_x_abs} (rel:{x_offset_from_agent}): North Path: {status_north}, South Path: {status_south}. "
                                         f"Suggests moving {'east' if x_offset_from_agent > 0 else 'west'} is a potential strategy.")

            if found_clear_x:
                output_lines.extend(found_clear_x)
            else:
                output_lines.append("  No immediately visible alternative X-coordinates found that offer a clear path (north or south) for lava circumvention within 5 horizontal steps.")


    # 6. Closest Lethal Obstruction 
    closest_lethal_obstruction = {'distance': float('inf'), 'rel_x': -1, 'rel_y': -1, 'char': ''}
    for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x, rel_y, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords:
        if char == '}': 
            current_distance = abs(rel_x) + abs(rel_y)
            if current_distance < closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']:
                closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] = current_distance
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x'] = rel_x
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y'] = rel_y
                closest_lethal_obstruction['char'] = char
        # Also consider the known lava X=30, Y=9-13 even if not directly seen as '}'
        elif map_has_abs_coords and abs_x == KNOWN_LAVA_X and KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= abs_y <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
             current_distance = abs(rel_x) + abs(rel_y) # Recompute rel_x, rel_y for direct comparison
             if current_distance < closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']:
                closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] = current_distance
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x'] = rel_x
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y'] = rel_y
                closest_lethal_obstruction['char'] = '}' # Represent it as the lava symbol

    if closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] != float('inf'):
        rel_x = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x']
        rel_y = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y']
        manhattan_distance = closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']
        
        char_symbol = closest_lethal_obstruction['char']
        char_description = KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(char_symbol, "lethal obstruction (unknown char)")
        direction_str = get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y)

        output_lines.append(f"\nClosest {KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}'] } '{char_symbol}' detected (either directly seen or inferred by known lava coordinates):") 
        output_lines.append(f"  Relative position: ({rel_x},{rel_y}) from agent.")
        output_lines.append(f"  Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}")
        output_lines.append(f"  Location: {direction_str}.")
    else: 
        output_lines.append(f"\nNo Molten Lava '{KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']}' detected or inferred in current visible map area.")


    # 7. Add information about stairs down with correct coordinate type
    if stairs_down_x_absolute != -1 and stairs_down_y_absolute != -1 and agent_x_absolute != -1:
        relative_x_to_stairs = stairs_down_x_absolute - agent_x_absolute
        relative_y_to_stairs = stairs_down_y_absolute - agent_y_absolute
        manhattan_distance = abs(relative_x_to_stairs) + abs(relative_y_to_stairs)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(relative_x_to_stairs, relative_y_to_stairs)
        
        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" abs:({stairs_down_x_absolute},{stairs_down_y_absolute})"
            f" rel:({relative_x_to_stairs},{relative_y_to_stairs})"
            f" {direction_str_to_stairs}, Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}."
        )
    elif stairs_down_x_relative_to_map != -1 and stairs_down_y_relative_to_map != -1 and found_agent_on_map:
        manhattan_distance = abs(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map) + abs(stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map, stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" Relative position: ({stairs_down_x_relative_to_map},{stairs_down_y_relative_to_map}) from agent (absolute position unknown),"
            f" Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance},"
            f" Location: {direction_str_to_stairs}."
        )
    elif found_agent_on_map: 
        output_lines.append("\nStairs down not found in the current visible map area.")
    
    while output_lines and not output_lines[-1].strip():
        output_lines.pop()

    return "\n".join(output_lines)

import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    output_lines = []
    
    agent_x_absolute = -1
    agent_y_absolute = -1
    
    stairs_down_x_absolute = -1 
    stairs_down_y_absolute = -1
    stairs_down_x_relative_to_map = -1 
    stairs_down_y_relative_to_map = -1

    is_prompting_for_direction = False
    found_agent_on_map = False
    agent_relative_x_on_map = -1
    agent_relative_y_on_map = -1

    # Define known symbols and their descriptions
    KNOWN_SYMBOLS = {
        '>': "Stairs down",
        '<': "Stairs up",
        'x': "Trap",
        '-': "Wall (horizontal)",
        '|': "Wall (vertical)",
        '}': "Molten Lava", 
        'F': "Static entity",
        'd': "Jackal (monster)", 
        '.': "Floor tile", 
        ':': "Fountain", 
        'H': "Monster (hobgoblin)", # Added for potential future generalizability based on typical Nethack symbols
    }

    # Helper to convert relative coordinates to a readable direction string
    def get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y):
        if rel_x == 0 and rel_y == 0:
            return "at agent's position"
        
        directions = []
        if rel_y < 0: directions.append("north")
        elif rel_y > 0: directions.append("south")
        if rel_x > 0: directions.append("east")
        elif rel_x < 0: directions.append("west")
        
        # Consolidate diagonal directions
        if len(directions) == 2:
            return f"{directions[0]}{directions[1]}"
        elif len(directions) == 1:
            return directions[0]
        return ""


    # 0. Extract Message
    message_match = re.search(r'message:\n(.*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\Z)', observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
        if message_content:
            output_lines.append(f"Message: {message_content}")
            if "In what direction?" in message_content:
                output_lines.append("Environment is prompting for a direction.")
                is_prompting_for_direction = True
    
    # 1. Extract Map Section
    map_section_match = re.search(r'map:\n(.*?)(?=\n+Agent the Aspirant|\Z)', observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    
    map_content_raw_lines = []
    if map_section_match:
        map_content_raw_lines = map_section_match.group(1).split('\n')
        # Clean up empty lines at start/end of map content
        while map_content_raw_lines and not map_content_raw_lines[0].strip():
            map_content_raw_lines.pop(0)
        while map_content_raw_lines and not map_content_raw_lines[-1].strip():
            map_content_raw_lines.pop()

    if not map_content_raw_lines:
        output_lines.append("Map section found but is empty or contains no visible elements.")
    
    # Find agent's relative position on map (within the visible map window)
    if map_content_raw_lines:
        for y_idx, line in enumerate(map_content_raw_lines):
            if '@' in line:
                agent_relative_x_on_map = line.find('@')
                agent_relative_y_on_idx = y_idx 
                found_agent_on_map = True
                break
    
    # 2. Determine Agent's Absolute Position and relationship to map parsing
    cursor_x, cursor_y = -1, -1
    cursor_match = re.search(r'\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)', observation_text)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

        if found_agent_on_map and not is_prompting_for_direction:
            agent_x_absolute = cursor_x
            agent_y_absolute = cursor_y
            output_lines.append(f"Agent is at: ({agent_x_absolute},{agent_y_absolute}) (determined from cursor position, which aligns with '@' on map)")
        elif found_agent_on_map and is_prompting_for_direction:
            output_lines.append("Agent's absolute coordinates are currently ambiguous due to an active prompt.")
            output_lines.append(f"For relative calculations, agent is at (0,0) in the map's local frame.")
        else: # Agent not found on map
            output_lines.append(f"Agent's symbol '@' not found on map. Cursor is at: ({cursor_x},{cursor_y}). Absolute agent position is ambiguous.")
            return "\n".join(output_lines) 
    elif found_agent_on_map: 
        output_lines.append("Agent's absolute coordinates are currently ambiguous as cursor coordinates are missing, even though '@' is on map.")
        output_lines.append(f"For relative calculations, agent is at (0,0) in the map's local frame.")
    else: 
        output_lines.append("Agent's coordinates not found. Cannot proceed with map perception accurately.")
        return "\n".join(output_lines)

    # Calculate the absolute coordinates of the top-left corner of the visible map fragment
    visible_map_start_absolute_x = -1
    visible_map_start_absolute_y = -1
    
    map_has_abs_coords = (agent_x_absolute != -1 and agent_y_absolute != -1)
    if map_has_abs_coords:
        visible_map_start_absolute_x = agent_x_absolute - agent_relative_x_on_map
        visible_map_start_absolute_y = agent_y_absolute - agent_relative_y_on_idx

    # Store map elements by their absolute position and a separate dict for relative (for 1-step lookahead)
    perceived_map_elements_absolute = {}
    perceived_map_elements_relative = {} # For 1-step lookahead, (rel_x, rel_y) -> char
    
    raw_map_elements_coords = [] 
    lava_tiles_detailed = [] 
    
    # Specific known absolute coordinates for lava from world knowledge
    KNOWN_LAVA_X = 30
    KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN = 9
    KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX = 13


    # 3. Process Map Characters for environmental features
    if map_content_raw_lines and found_agent_on_map: 
        
        for y_offset, line in enumerate(map_content_raw_lines):
            for x_offset, char in enumerate(line):
                
                rel_x_to_agent = x_offset - agent_relative_x_on_map
                rel_y_to_agent = y_offset - agent_relative_y_on_idx
                
                # Store relative positions for 1-step lookahead
                perceived_map_elements_relative[(rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent)] = char

                current_absolute_x = -1
                current_absolute_y = -1

                if map_has_abs_coords:
                    current_absolute_x = visible_map_start_absolute_x + x_offset
                    current_absolute_y = visible_map_start_absolute_y + y_offset
                    perceived_map_elements_absolute[(current_absolute_x, current_absolute_y)] = char
                
                if char == '@': 
                    continue # Agent's own position
                elif char == '>': 
                    stairs_down_x_relative_to_map = rel_x_to_agent
                    stairs_down_y_relative_to_map = rel_y_to_agent
                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        stairs_down_x_absolute = current_absolute_x
                        stairs_down_y_absolute = current_absolute_y
                
                if char.strip(): 
                    raw_map_elements_coords.append((current_absolute_x, current_absolute_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, x_offset, y_offset, char))
                
                if char == '}':
                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        lava_tiles_detailed.append((current_absolute_x, current_absolute_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, x_offset, y_offset))
        
        # 3.0 Agent's current position relative to known lava threat
        if map_has_abs_coords:
            if KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= agent_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                output_lines.append(f"WARNING: Agent's current Y-position ({agent_y_absolute}) is WITHIN the lethal Y-span ({KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN}-{KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX}) for known molten lava at X={KNOWN_LAVA_X}. Agent must prioritize moving safely NORTH or SOUTH to escape this Y-range before attempting to cross X={KNOWN_LAVA_X}.")
            if agent_x_absolute < KNOWN_LAVA_X:
                output_lines.append(f"  Agent's X-position ({agent_x_absolute}) is currently WEST of the lethal X.")
            elif agent_x_absolute > KNOWN_LAVA_X:
                output_lines.append(f"  Agent's X-position ({agent_x_absolute}) is currently EAST of the lethal X.")
            else: 
                output_lines.append(f"  Agent's X-position ({agent_x_absolute}) is currently AT the lethal X.")


        # 3.1 Overall Molten Lava Obstruction Bounding Box
        if lava_tiles_detailed:
            min_lava_abs_x = min(t[0] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1
            max_lava_abs_x = max(t[0] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1
            min_lava_abs_y = min(t[1] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1
            max_lava_abs_y = max(t[1] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1

            min_lava_rel_x = min(t[2] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            max_lava_rel_x = max(t[2] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            min_lava_rel_y = min(t[3] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            max_lava_rel_y = max(t[3] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)

            min_lava_map_x = min(t[4] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            max_lava_map_x = max(t[4] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            min_lava_map_y = min(t[5] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)
            max_lava_map_y = max(t[5] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)

            output_lines.append("\nOverall Molten Lava Obstruction (Bounding Box from visible map):")
            output_lines.append(f"  Visible map content relative Bounding Box (offset from map content top-left): ({min_lava_map_x},{min_lava_map_y}) to ({max_lava_map_x},{max_lava_map_y}).")
            output_lines.append(f"  Total individual lava tiles visible: {len(lava_tiles_detailed)}")
            
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                output_lines.append(f"  Absolute Bounding Box (visible): ({min_lava_abs_x},{min_lava_abs_y}) to ({max_lava_abs_x},{max_lava_abs_y})")
            output_lines.append(f"  Agent-relative Bounding Box (visible): ({min_lava_rel_x},{min_lava_rel_y}) to ({max_lava_rel_x},{max_lava_rel_y}) from agent.")
            
            output_lines.append(f"  Known absolute lava extent: X={KNOWN_LAVA_X}, Y={KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN} through {KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX}.")

            output_lines.append(f"  To circumnavigate the molten lava, move to Y <= {KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1} (to be safely north) or Y >= {KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1} (to be safely south) before attempting to cross X={KNOWN_LAVA_X}.")


        map_elements_found_list = []
        reported_coords_by_line = set() 

        # --- Line Detection for Lava and Walls ---
        # Group similar elements for line detection
        lava_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '}' and mx != -1 and my != -1]
        horizontal_wall_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '-' and mx != -1 and my != -1]
        vertical_wall_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '|' and mx != -1 and my != -1]

        def detect_and_report_lines(char_type, known_type_desc, tiles_list, is_horizontal_char):
            grouped_by_fixed_coord = {}
            if is_horizontal_char: 
                for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y in tiles_list:
                    grouped_by_fixed_coord.setdefault(abs_y, []).append((abs_x, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y))
            else: 
                for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x_to_agent, rel_y_to_agent, map_x, map_y in tiles_list:

            reported_lines_local = []
            for fixed_coord, variable_coords_info in grouped_by_fixed_coord.items():

                for i in range(1, len(variable_coords_info)):
                    next_abs_var, next_rel_var, _, _, _ = variable_coords_info[i]

                        current_abs_var = next_abs_var
                        current_rel_var = next_rel_var
                    else:

                                    line_end_abs = (current_abs_var, fixed_coord)
                                    line_start_rel = (start_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group) 
                                    line_end_rel = (current_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group) 
                                else: # Vertical
                                    line_start_abs = (fixed_coord, start_abs_var)
                                    line_end_abs = (fixed_coord, current_abs_var)
                                    line_start_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, start_rel_var) 
                                    line_end_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, current_rel_var) 
                                
                                length = abs(current_abs_var - start_abs_var) + 1
                                reported_lines_local.append(
                                    f"{known_type_desc} '{char_type}' detected as a {'horizontal' if is_horizontal_char else 'vertical'} line of length {length}: "
                                    f"from abs:{line_start_abs} to {line_end_abs}, "
                                    f"rel:{line_start_rel} to {line_end_rel} from agent."
                                )
                                if is_horizontal_char:
                                    for x_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[0], line_end_abs[0] + 1):
                                        reported_coords_by_line.add((x_coord_in_line, line_start_abs[1]))
                                else: 
                                    for y_coord_in_line in range(line_start_abs[1], line_end_abs[1] + 1):
                                        reported_coords_by_line.add((line_start_abs[0], y_coord_in_line))
                            
                        # Reset for next segment or single point

                # After loop, check for any remaining line segment

                            line_start_abs = (start_abs_var, fixed_coord)

                            line_end_rel = (current_rel_var, fixed_rel_coord_for_group)
                        else:

                            line_start_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, start_rel_var)
                            line_end_rel = (fixed_rel_coord_for_group, current_rel_var)
                        
                        length = abs(current_abs_var - start_abs_var) + 1

                safety_status_msg = f"SAFE ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]})"
            elif target_char == 'd':
                safety_status_msg = f"MOVE_ATTACKS_MONSTER ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]} '{target_char}', agent will attack and likely kill monster without consuming an additional action)" 
            elif target_char == 'x': 
                safety_status_msg = f"CAUTION (Trap '{target_char}')"
            else:
                safety_status_msg = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)" 

            output_lines.append(f"  Move {move_name}: {status_prefix}{safety_status_msg}")
    
    # 5. Proactive Lava Avoidance (2-step check)
    if found_agent_on_map:
        proactive_warnings = []
        move_directions = {
            "north": (0, -1), "northeast": (1, -1), "east": (1, 0), "southeast": (1, 1),
            "south": (0, 1), "southwest": (-1, 1), "west": (-1, 0), "northwest": (-1, -1)
        }
        
        for first_move_name, (first_dx, first_dy) in move_directions.items():
            step1_x_rel = first_dx
            step1_y_rel = first_dy
            step1_char = perceived_map_elements_relative.get((step1_x_rel, step1_y_rel), ' ')

            step1_x_absolute = -1
            step1_y_absolute = -1
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                step1_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + first_dx
                step1_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + first_dy
            
            is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = False
            if step1_char in ['}', '-', '|']:
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True
            elif map_has_abs_coords and step1_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and \
                 KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step1_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True

            if is_step1_lethal_or_blocked:
                continue 

            if step1_char in ['.', ' ', '<', '>', 'F', ':', 'd', 'x']: 
                for second_move_name, (second_dx, second_dy) in move_directions.items():
                    step2_x_rel = step1_x_rel + second_dx
                    step2_y_rel = step1_y_rel + second_dy
                    step2_char = perceived_map_elements_relative.get((step2_x_rel, step2_y_rel), ' ')

                    step2_x_absolute = -1
                    step2_y_absolute = -1
                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        step2_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + step2_x_rel  
                        step2_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + step2_y_rel  

                    status_type = ""
                    status_detail = ""

                    if step2_char == '}':
                        status_type = "LETHAL"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']})"
                    elif map_has_abs_coords and step2_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and \
                         KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step2_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                        status_type = "LETHAL"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']}) - crossing X={KNOWN_LAVA_X} while in lethal Y-span ({KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN}-{KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX})"
                    elif step2_char in ['-', '|']:
                        status_type = "BLOCKED"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[step2_char]} '{step2_char}')"
                    
                    if status_type:
                        warning_message = (
                            f"  Moving {first_move_name} then {second_move_name} "
                            f"would be {status_type} {status_detail} at rel:({step2_x_rel},{step2_y_rel})."
                        )
                        proactive_warnings.append(warning_message)

        output_lines.append("\nProactive 2-step Lookahead (Lava & Walls):")
        if proactive_warnings:
            proactive_warnings = sorted(list(set(proactive_warnings))) 
            output_lines.extend(proactive_warnings)
        else:
            output_lines.append("  No immediate 2-step paths detected leading to lethal or blocked obstructions.")

    # 5.1 Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate)
    if map_has_abs_coords:
        output_lines.append("\nLava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate):")
        
        # Check path north of lava
        target_y_north = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1 
        target_char_north = perceived_map_elements_relative.get((0, target_y_north - agent_y_absolute), ' ')
        
        path_north_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if target_char_north == '.':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_north == ' ':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_north in ['-', '|', '}']: 
            path_north_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_north, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_north}')"
        
        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely NORTH (Y<={target_y_north}) is {path_north_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_north}), rel:(0,{target_y_north - agent_y_absolute}).")

        # Check path south of lava
        target_y_south = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1
        target_char_south = perceived_map_elements_relative.get((0, target_y_south - agent_y_absolute), ' ')

        path_south_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if target_char_south == '.':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_south == ' ':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_south in ['-', '|', '}']:
            path_south_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_south, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_south}')"

        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely SOUTH (Y>={target_y_south}) is {path_south_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_south}), rel:(0,{target_y_south - agent_y_absolute}).")

    # NEW: 5.2 Dynamic Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (nearby X-coordinates)
    if map_has_abs_coords:
        output_lines.append("\nDynamic Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (nearby X-coordinates for bypass):")
        safe_y_north_val = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1
        safe_y_south_val = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1
        
        # Check X-coordinates within +/- 5 of agent's current X, excluding agent's current X
        # This range (10 steps) often allows finding immediate bypasses within typical map-view limits
        x_check_range = range(agent_x_absolute - 5, agent_x_absolute + 6) 
        
        potential_bypass_found = False
        
        # Collect all perceived elements by absolute position for efficient lookup
        # This prevents constantly re-determining the character from raw map lines
        # if perceived_map_elements_absolute already contains this information fully.
        
        for check_x in sorted(list(x_check_range)):
            if check_x == agent_x_absolute:
                continue # Skip current X, already handled by 5.1

            path_north_status = "UNKNOWN (Not visible or inaccessible)"
            path_south_status = "UNKNOWN (Not visible or inaccessible)"
            
            # Check the northern path at this X
            north_tile_char = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((check_x, safe_y_north_val), None)
            if north_tile_char is not None:
                if north_tile_char == '.' or north_tile_char == ' ':
                    path_north_status = "CLEAR"
                elif north_tile_char in ['-', '|', '}']:
                    path_north_status = f"BLOCKED by '{north_tile_char}'"
                else: # Any other visible char
                    path_north_status = f"NOT CLEAR (symbol '{north_tile_char}')"
            
            # Check the southern path at this X
            south_tile_char = perceived_map_elements_absolute.get((check_x, safe_y_south_val), None)
            if south_tile_char is not None:
                if south_tile_char == '.' or south_tile_char == ' ':
                    path_south_status = "CLEAR"
                elif south_tile_char in ['-', '|', '}']:
                    path_south_status = f"BLOCKED by '{south_tile_char}'"
                else: # Any other visible char
                    path_south_status = f"NOT CLEAR (symbol '{south_tile_char}')"

            if path_north_status == "CLEAR" or path_south_status == "CLEAR":
                potential_bypass_found = True
                description = f"  At X={check_x}:"
                if path_north_status == "CLEAR":
                    description += f" NORTH path (Y={safe_y_north_val}) is CLEAR."
                if path_south_status == "CLEAR":
                    if "NORTH path" in description: description += " AND"
                    description += f" SOUTH path (Y={safe_y_south_val}) is CLEAR."
                output_lines.append(description)
            elif path_north_status != "UNKNOWN (Not visible or inaccessible)" and path_south_status != "UNKNOWN (Not visible or inaccessible)":
                 # Only report blocked paths if they are actually visible
                description = f"  At X={check_x}: NORTH path (Y={safe_y_north_val}) is {path_north_status} and SOUTH path (Y={safe_y_south_val}) is {path_south_status}."
                output_lines.append(description)

        if not potential_bypass_found:
            output_lines.append("  No immediately visible clear bypass paths to Y<={0} or Y>={1} found at nearby X-coordinates (within +/- 5).".format(safe_y_north_val, safe_y_south_val))



    # 6. Closest Lethal Obstruction 
    closest_lethal_obstruction = {'distance': float('inf'), 'rel_x': -1, 'rel_y': -1, 'char': ''}
    for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x, rel_y, map_x_on_view, map_y_on_view, char in raw_map_elements_coords:
        if char == '}': 
            current_distance = abs(rel_x) + abs(rel_y)
            if current_distance < closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']:
                closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] = current_distance
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x'] = rel_x
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y'] = rel_y
                closest_lethal_obstruction['char'] = char

    if closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] != float('inf'):
        rel_x = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x']
        rel_y = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y']
        manhattan_distance = closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']
        
        char_symbol = closest_lethal_obstruction['char']
        char_description = KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(char_symbol, "lethal obstruction (unknown char)")
        direction_str = get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y)

        output_lines.append(f"\nClosest {KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}'] } '{char_symbol}' detected:") 
        output_lines.append(f"  Relative position: ({rel_x},{rel_y}) from agent.")
        output_lines.append(f"  Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}")
        output_lines.append(f"  Location: {direction_str}.")


    # 7. Add information about stairs down with correct coordinate type
    if stairs_down_x_absolute != -1 and stairs_down_y_absolute != -1 and agent_x_absolute != -1:
        relative_x_to_stairs = stairs_down_x_absolute - agent_x_absolute
        relative_y_to_stairs = stairs_down_y_absolute - agent_y_absolute
        manhattan_distance = abs(relative_x_to_stairs) + abs(relative_y_to_stairs)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(relative_x_to_stairs, relative_y_to_stairs)
        
        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" abs:({stairs_down_x_absolute},{stairs_down_y_absolute})"
            f" rel:({relative_x_to_stairs},{relative_y_to_stairs})"
            f" {direction_str_to_stairs}, Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}."
        )
    elif stairs_down_x_relative_to_map != -1 and stairs_down_y_relative_to_map != -1 and found_agent_on_map:
        manhattan_distance = abs(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map) + abs(stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map, stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" Relative position: ({stairs_down_x_relative_to_map},{stairs_down_y_relative_to_map}) from agent (absolute position unknown),"
            f" Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance},"
            f" Location: {direction_str_to_stairs}."
        )
    elif found_agent_on_map: 
        output_lines.append("\nStairs down not found in the current visible map area.")
    
    while output_lines and not output_lines[-1].strip():
        output_lines.pop()

    return "\n".join(output_lines)

import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:

    agent_y_absolute = -1
    
    stairs_down_x_absolute = -1 
    stairs_down_y_absolute = -1
    stairs_down_x_relative_to_map = -1 
    stairs_down_y_relative_to_map = -1

    is_prompting_for_direction = False
    found_agent_on_map = False
    agent_relative_x_on_map = -1
    agent_relative_y_on_map = -1

    # Define known symbols and their descriptions
    KNOWN_SYMBOLS = {
        '>': "Stairs down",
        '<': "Stairs up",
        'x': "Trap",
        '-': "Wall (horizontal)",
        '|': "Wall (vertical)",
        '}': "Molten Lava", 
        'F': "Static entity",
        'd': "Jackal (monster)", 
        '.': "Floor tile", 
        ':': "Fountain", 
    }

    # Helper to convert relative coordinates to a readable direction string
    def get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y):
        if rel_x == 0 and rel_y == 0:
            return "at agent's position"
        
        directions = []
        if rel_y < 0: directions.append("north")
        elif rel_y > 0: directions.append("south")
        if rel_x > 0: directions.append("east")
        elif rel_x < 0: directions.append("west")
        
        # Consolidate diagonal directions
        if len(directions) == 2:
            return f"{directions[0]}{directions[1]}"
        elif len(directions) == 1:
            return directions[0]
        return ""


    # 0. Extract Message
    message_match = re.search(r'message:\n(.*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\Z)', observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
        if message_content:
            output_lines.append(f"Message: {message_content}")
            if "In what direction?" in message_content:
                output_lines.append("Environment is prompting for a direction.")
                is_prompting_for_direction = True
    
    # 1. Extract Map Section
    map_section_match = re.search(r'map:\n(.*?)(?=\n+Agent the Aspirant|\Z)', observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    
    map_content_raw_lines = []
    if map_section_match:
        map_content_raw_lines = map_section_match.group(1).split('\n')
        # Clean up empty lines at start/end of map content
        while map_content_raw_lines and not map_content_raw_lines[0].strip():
            map_content_raw_lines.pop(0)
        while map_content_raw_lines and not map_content_raw_lines[-1].strip():
            map_content_raw_lines.pop()

    if not map_content_raw_lines:
        output_lines.append("Map section found but is empty or contains no visible elements.")
    
    # Find agent's relative position on map (within the visible map window)
    if map_content_raw_lines:
        for y_idx, line in enumerate(map_content_raw_lines):
            if '@' in line:
                agent_relative_x_on_map = line.find('@')
                agent_relative_y_on_map = y_idx 
                found_agent_on_map = True
                break
    
    # 2. Determine Agent's Absolute Position and relationship to map parsing
    cursor_x, cursor_y = -1, -1
    cursor_match = re.search(r'\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)', observation_text)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

        if found_agent_on_map and not is_prompting_for_direction:
            agent_x_absolute = cursor_x
            agent_y_absolute = cursor_y
            output_lines.append(f"Agent is at: ({agent_x_absolute},{agent_y_absolute}) (determined from cursor position, which aligns with '@' on map)")
        elif found_agent_on_map and is_prompting_for_direction:
            output_lines.append("Agent's absolute coordinates are currently ambiguous due to an active prompt.")
            output_lines.append(f"For relative calculations, agent is at (0,0) in the map's local frame.")
        else: # Agent not found on map
            output_lines.append(f"Agent's symbol '@' not found on map. Cursor is at: ({cursor_x},{cursor_y}). Absolute agent position is ambiguous.")
            return "\n".join(output_lines) 
    elif found_agent_on_map: 
        output_lines.append("Agent's absolute coordinates are currently ambiguous as cursor coordinates are missing, even though '@' is on map.")
        output_lines.append(f"For relative calculations, agent is at (0,0) in the map's local frame.")
    else: 
        output_lines.append("Agent's coordinates not found. Cannot proceed with map perception accurately.")
        return "\n".join(output_lines)

    # Calculate the absolute coordinates of the top-left corner of the visible map fragment
    visible_map_start_absolute_x = -1
    visible_map_start_absolute_y = -1

    if map_has_abs_coords:
        visible_map_start_absolute_x = agent_x_absolute - agent_relative_x_on_map
        visible_map_start_absolute_y = agent_y_absolute - agent_relative_y_on_map

    # Dictionary to store perceived map elements by their relative position
    perceived_map_elements = {}

    KNOWN_LAVA_X = 30
    KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN = 9
    KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX = 13


    # 3. Process Map Characters for environmental features
    if map_content_raw_lines and found_agent_on_map:

                rel_y_to_agent = y_offset - agent_relative_y_on_map

                if char.strip():

Agent must prioritize moving safely NORTH or SOUTH to escape this Y-range before attempting to cross X={KNOWN_LAVA_X}.")
            if agent_x_absolute < KNOWN_LAVA_X:

        # 3.1 Overall Molten Lava Obstruction Bounding Box

            min_lava_abs_y = min(t[1] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1
            max_lava_abs_y = max(t[1] for t in lava_tiles_detailed) if map_has_abs_coords else -1

            min_lava_rel_x = min(t[2] for t in lava_tiles_detailed)

        horizontal_wall_tiles = [(mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y) for mx, my, rx, ry, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords if char == '-' and mx != -1 and my != -1]

                char_desc = KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(char)
                if char_desc:
                    additional_info = ""
                    if char == 'd':
                        additional_info = " (Moving into or adjacent to this tile will cause agent to attack and likely kill this monster without consuming an additional action.)"
                    elif char == 'x':
                        additional_info = " (Trap)"
                    
                    map_elements_found_list.append(f"{char_desc} '{char}' at: {' '.join(description_parts)}{location_display}{additional_info}.")
                elif char.strip(): 
                    map_elements_found_list.append(f"Unknown symbol '{char}' at: {' '.join(description_parts)}{location_display}.")
        
        map_elements_found_list.sort() 
        output_lines.extend(map_elements_found_list) 


    # 4. Immediate Movement Safety & 1-step Lookahead
    if found_agent_on_map:
        output_lines.append("\nMovement Safety & 1-step Lookahead:")
        move_directions = {
            "north": (0, -1), "northeast": (1, -1), "east": (1, 0), "southeast": (1, 1),
            "south": (0, 1), "southwest": (-1, 1), "west": (-1, 0), "northwest": (-1, -1)
        }
        
        for move_name, (dx, dy) in move_directions.items():
            target_x_rel = dx
            target_y_rel = dy
            target_char = perceived_map_elements.get((target_x_rel, target_y_rel), ' ')
            
            safety_status_msg = ""

            target_x_absolute = -1
            target_y_absolute = -1
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                target_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + dx
                target_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + dy

            status_prefix = ""
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                status_prefix += f"at abs:({target_x_absolute},{target_y_absolute}) "
            status_prefix += f"rel:({target_x_rel},{target_y_rel}) char:'{target_char}' -> "


            is_moving_into_lava_column = False
            if map_has_abs_coords and target_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and \
               KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= target_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                is_moving_into_lava_column = True
            
            if is_moving_into_lava_column:
                safety_status_msg = f"LETHAL ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']}) - crossing X={KNOWN_LAVA_X} while in lethal Y-span ({KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN}-{KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX})"
            elif target_char == '}':
                safety_status_msg = f"LETHAL ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']})"
            elif target_char in ['-', '|']:
                safety_status_msg = f"BLOCKED ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]} '{target_char}')" 
            elif target_char == '.': 
                safety_status_msg = "SAFE (Floor tile)"
            elif target_char == ' ':
                safety_status_msg = "SAFE (Open space)"
            elif target_char in ['<', '>']: 
                safety_status_msg = f"SAFE ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]})"
            elif target_char in ['F', ':']: 
                safety_status_msg = f"SAFE ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]})"
            elif target_char == 'd':
                safety_status_msg = f"MOVE_ATTACKS_MONSTER ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[target_char]} '{target_char}', agent will attack and likely kill monster without consuming an additional action)" 
            elif target_char == 'x': 
                safety_status_msg = f"CAUTION (Trap '{target_char}')"
            else:
                safety_status_msg = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)" 

            output_lines.append(f"  Move {move_name}: {status_prefix}{safety_status_msg}")
    
    # 5. Proactive Lava Avoidance (2-step check)
    if found_agent_on_map:
        proactive_warnings = []
        move_directions = {
            "north": (0, -1), "northeast": (1, -1), "east": (1, 0), "southeast": (1, 1),
            "south": (0, 1), "southwest": (-1, 1), "west": (-1, 0), "northwest": (-1, -1)
        }
        
        for first_move_name, (first_dx, first_dy) in move_directions.items():
            step1_x_rel = first_dx
            step1_y_rel = first_dy
            step1_char = perceived_map_elements.get((step1_x_rel, step1_y_rel), ' ')

            step1_x_absolute = -1
            step1_y_absolute = -1
            if map_has_abs_coords:
                step1_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + first_dx
                step1_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + first_dy
            
            is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = False
            if step1_char in ['}', '-', '|']:
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True
            elif map_has_abs_coords and step1_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and \
                 KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step1_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                is_step1_lethal_or_blocked = True

            if is_step1_lethal_or_blocked:
                continue 

            if step1_char in ['.', ' ', '<', '>', 'F', ':', 'd', 'x']: 
                for second_move_name, (second_dx, second_dy) in move_directions.items():
                    step2_x_rel = step1_x_rel + second_dx
                    step2_y_rel = step1_y_rel + second_dy
                    step2_char = perceived_map_elements.get((step2_x_rel, step2_y_rel), ' ')

                    step2_x_absolute = -1
                    step2_y_absolute = -1
                    if map_has_abs_coords:
                        step2_x_absolute = agent_x_absolute + step2_x_rel  
                        step2_y_absolute = agent_y_absolute + step2_y_rel  

                    status_type = ""
                    status_detail = ""

                    if step2_char == '}':
                        status_type = "LETHAL"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']})"
                    elif map_has_abs_coords and step2_x_absolute == KNOWN_LAVA_X and \
                         KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= step2_y_absolute <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                        status_type = "LETHAL"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}']}) - crossing X={KNOWN_LAVA_X} while in lethal Y-span ({KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN}-{KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX})"
                    elif step2_char in ['-', '|']:
                        status_type = "BLOCKED"
                        status_detail = f"({KNOWN_SYMBOLS[step2_char]} '{step2_char}')"
                    
                    if status_type:
                        warning_message = (
                            f"  Moving {first_move_name} then {second_move_name} "
                            f"would be {status_type} {status_detail} at rel:({step2_x_rel},{step2_y_rel})."
                        )
                        proactive_warnings.append(warning_message)

        output_lines.append("\nProactive 2-step Lookahead (Lava & Walls):")
        if proactive_warnings:
            proactive_warnings = sorted(list(set(proactive_warnings))) 
            output_lines.extend(proactive_warnings)
        else:
            output_lines.append("  No immediate 2-step paths detected leading to lethal or blocked obstructions.")

    # 5.1 Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate)
    if map_has_abs_coords:
        output_lines.append("\nLava Circumnavigation Path Check (at current X-coordinate):")
        
        # Check path north of lava
        target_y_north = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1 
        target_char_north = perceived_map_elements.get((0, target_y_north - agent_y_absolute), ' ')
        
        path_north_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if target_char_north == '.':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_north == ' ':
            path_north_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_north in ['-', '|', '}']: 
            path_north_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_north, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_north}')"
        
        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely NORTH (Y<={target_y_north}) is {path_north_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_north}), rel:(0,{target_y_north - agent_y_absolute}).")

        # Check path south of lava
        target_y_south = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1
        target_char_south = perceived_map_elements.get((0, target_y_south - agent_y_absolute), ' ')

        path_south_status = "UNKNOWN (off map or unperceived character)"
        if target_char_south == '.':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Floor tile)"
        elif target_char_south == ' ':
            path_south_status = "CLEAR (Open space)"
        elif target_char_south in ['-', '|', '}']:
            path_south_status = f"BLOCKED by a {KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(target_char_south, 'obstruction')} ('{target_char_south}')"

        output_lines.append(f"  Path to safely SOUTH (Y>={target_y_south}) is {path_south_status} at abs:({agent_x_absolute}, {target_y_south}), rel:(0,{target_y_south - agent_y_absolute}).")


    # 5.2 Dynamic Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (nearby X-coordinates for bypass)
    if map_has_abs_coords and map_content_raw_lines:
        output_lines.append("\nDynamic Lava Circumnavigation Path Check (nearby X-coordinates for bypass):")
        
        # Determine the visible X-range on the map
        min_visible_x_abs = visible_map_start_absolute_x
        max_visible_x_abs = visible_map_start_absolute_x + len(map_content_raw_lines[0]) - 1

        # Adjust range to provide context
        # Check X-coordinates from a few tiles to the left of visible_map_start_absolute_x
        # to a few tiles to the right of max_visible_x_abs
        # This will include areas maybe not directly on map if map is small, but within context
        # For simplicity, let's just stick to visible range for now or slightly beyond
        
        # Iterating over all X-coordinates that are visible on the map allows correct relative/absolute calculation
        # It needs to be clear if the check is for *any* X-coordinate or *only visible* ones.
        # The prompt implies visible.
        
        # Use a list to store results and sort them later
        bypass_paths_info = []

        # Iterate through relevant X-coordinates from the visible map
        for current_x_abs in range(min_visible_x_abs, max_visible_x_abs + 1):
            target_y_north = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN - 1 
            target_y_south = KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX + 1

            # Convert absolute target coordinates to relative coordinates to the agent
            rel_x_to_current_x = current_x_abs - agent_x_absolute
            rel_y_to_north_path = target_y_north - agent_y_absolute
            rel_y_to_south_path = target_y_south - agent_y_absolute

            char_north = perceived_map_elements.get((rel_x_to_current_x, rel_y_to_north_path), ' ')
            char_south = perceived_map_elements.get((rel_x_to_current_x, rel_y_to_south_path), ' ')

            north_status = "CLEAR" if char_north in ['.', ' ', '<', '>'] else f"BLOCKED by '{char_north}'"
            south_status = "CLEAR" if char_south in ['.', ' ', '<', '>'] else f"BLOCKED by '{char_south}'"
            
            # Additional check for lava if char is not in perceived_map_elements (e.g. off map)
            if char_north == ' ':
                if current_x_abs == KNOWN_LAVA_X and KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= target_y_north <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                    north_status = f"LETHAL (predicted lava at X={KNOWN_LAVA_X})"

            if char_south == ' ':
                if current_x_abs == KNOWN_LAVA_X and KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MIN <= target_y_south <= KNOWN_LAVA_Y_MAX:
                    south_status = f"LETHAL (predicted lava at X={KNOWN_LAVA_X})"


            bypass_paths_info.append(
                f"  At X={current_x_abs}: NORTH path (Y={target_y_north}) is {north_status}. AND SOUTH path (Y={target_y_south}) is {south_status}."
            )
        
        # Sort by X-coordinate
        output_lines.extend(sorted(bypass_paths_info, key=lambda s: int(re.search(r'X=(\d+)', s).group(1))))


    # 6. Closest Lethal Obstruction 
    closest_lethal_obstruction = {'distance': float('inf'), 'rel_x': -1, 'rel_y': -1, 'char': ''}
    for abs_x, abs_y, rel_x, rel_y, map_x, map_y, char in raw_map_elements_coords:
        if char == '}': 
            current_distance = abs(rel_x) + abs(rel_y)
            if current_distance < closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']:

                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x'] = rel_x
                closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y'] = rel_y
                closest_lethal_obstruction['char'] = char

    if closest_lethal_obstruction['distance'] != float('inf'):
        rel_x = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_x']
        rel_y = closest_lethal_obstruction['rel_y']
        manhattan_distance = closest_lethal_obstruction['distance']
        
        char_symbol = closest_lethal_obstruction['char']
        char_description = KNOWN_SYMBOLS.get(char_symbol, "lethal obstruction (unknown char)")
        direction_str = get_relative_direction_str(rel_x, rel_y)

        output_lines.append(f"\nClosest {KNOWN_SYMBOLS['}'] } '{char_symbol}' detected:")

        output_lines.append(f"  Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}")
        output_lines.append(f"  Location: {direction_str}.")

    if stairs_down_x_absolute != -1 and stairs_down_y_absolute != -1 and agent_x_absolute != -1:
        relative_x_to_stairs = stairs_down_x_absolute - agent_x_absolute
        relative_y_to_stairs = stairs_down_y_absolute - agent_y_absolute
        manhattan_distance = abs(relative_x_to_stairs) + abs(relative_y_to_stairs)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(relative_x_to_stairs, relative_y_to_stairs)
        
        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" abs:({stairs_down_x_absolute},{stairs_down_y_absolute})"
            f" rel:({relative_x_to_stairs},{relative_y_to_stairs})"
            f" {direction_str_to_stairs}, Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance}."
        )
    elif stairs_down_x_relative_to_map != -1 and stairs_down_y_relative_to_map != -1 and found_agent_on_map:
        manhattan_distance = abs(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map) + abs(stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        direction_str_to_stairs = get_relative_direction_str(stairs_down_x_relative_to_map, stairs_down_y_relative_to_map)

        output_lines.append(
            f"\nStairs down target ({KNOWN_SYMBOLS['>']} '>'):"
            f" Relative position: ({stairs_down_x_relative_to_map},{stairs_down_y_relative_to_map}) from agent (absolute position unknown),"
            f" Manhattan distance: {manhattan_distance},"
            f" Location: {direction_str_to_stairs}."
        )
    elif found_agent_on_map: 
        output_lines.append("\nStairs down not found in the current visible map area.")
    
    while output_lines and not output_lines[-1].strip():
        output_lines.pop()

    return "\n".join(output_lines)
